text.title: User Control and Freedom Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is the action inventory reachable (route → action → reversibility)?
Is Playwright / pa11y / axe-core available for focus-trap verification?

conclusion.verdict: apply: produce control-audit; verify focus traps; mark severity per reversibility/undo/cancel.
partial-apply: emit static audit but block sign-off until tooling verifies focus traps.
block: an action inventory is mandatory; static UI scan without inventory is incomplete.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, inventory reachable, Playwright available → produce audit; modal exit ≥3 paths per r3-modal-three-exits; irreversible-no-undo flagged severity 1 per r7-irreversible-severity1.
